title: Enderscape 3D
body:
# **Adds 3D items to [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) Mod**

Credits to [Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle) to let me use his amazing trim on this resourcepack [Fyoncle's 3D Trims](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fyoncles-3d-trims)
